---
title: "Software"
listing:
  sort: "year desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, description]
---

```{=html}
<head>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <style>
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, sans-serif;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        
        .category-header {
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-top: 36px;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            padding-bottom: 6px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #495057;
            color: #495057;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }

        .software-item {
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 12px 14px;
            background: #fafbfc;
            border-radius: 6px;
            border: 1px solid #e8e9eb;
            border-left: 2px solid #6c757d;
            box-shadow: none;
            transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
        }

        .software-item:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
            border-left-color: #495057;
        }

        .software-name {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            color: #212529;
            line-height: 1.35;
            font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
        }

        .software-description {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #495057;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            display: block;
            margin-top: 2px;
        }

        .software-meta {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #6c757d;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            display: block;
        }

        .role-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 3px 8px;
            background: #e8e9eb;
            color: #495057;
            border-radius: 3px;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-right: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }

        .year-label {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 3px 8px;
            background: #f8f9fa;
            color: #868e96;
            border-radius: 3px;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-right: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }

        /* Software type link */
        .software-link {
            font-size: 12px;
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 5px 12px;
            background: white;
            color: #6c757d;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-right: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .software-link:hover {
            background: #f8f9fa;
            color: #212529;
            border-color: #6c757d;
        }

        .software-link::before {
            content: "\f0c1";
            font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free";
            font-weight: 900;
            margin-right: 6px;
        }

        /* Package link */
        .package-link {
            font-size: 12px;
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 5px 12px;
            background: white;
            color: #0b5ed7;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-right: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .package-link:hover {
            background: #f8f9fa;
            color: #0952b3;
            border-color: #0b5ed7;
        }

        .package-link::before {
            content: "\f187";
            font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free";
            font-weight: 900;
            margin-right: 6px;
        }

        /* GitHub link */
        .github-link {
            font-size: 12px;
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 5px 12px;
            background: white;
            color: #212529;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-right: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .github-link:hover {
            background: #f8f9fa;
            color: #000;
            border-color: #212529;
        }

        .github-link::before {
            content: "\f09b";
            font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Brands";
            font-weight: 400;
            margin-right: 6px;
        }

        /* Website link */
        .website-link {
            font-size: 12px;
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 5px 12px;
            background: white;
            color: #495057;
            text-decoration: none;
            border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-right: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .website-link:hover {
            background: #f8f9fa;
            color: #212529;
            border-color: #495057;
        }

        .website-link::before {
            content: "\f0ac";
            font-family: "Font Awesome 6 Free";
            font-weight: 900;
            margin-right: 6px;
        }

        /* Responsive design */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .software-item {
                padding: 10px 12px;
            }
            
            .software-name {
                font-size: 15px;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

<div class="category-header">Websites & Databases</div>

<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">openESM</div>
    <div class="software-description">Open database of experience sampling datasets </div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2025</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Lead Developer</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Maintainer</span>
    </div>
    <a class="website-link" href="https://openesmdata.org">Visit Website</a>
    <a class="github-link" href="https://github.com/openesm-project/">GitHub</a>
</div>

<div class="category-header">R Packages</div>



<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">VARcheck</div>
    <div class="software-description">Visual Diagnostic Checks for Vector Autoregressive Models</div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2026</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Maintainer</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Author</span>
    </div>
    <a class="github-link" href="https://github.com/bsiepe/VARcheck">GitHub</a>
</div>

<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">openesm</div>
    <div class="software-description">Accessing the openESM Database</div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2025</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Maintainer</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Author</span>
    </div>
    <a class="package-link" href="https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.openesm">CRAN</a>
    <a class="github-link" href="https://github.com/openesm-project/">GitHub</a>
</div>



<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">intervalpsych</div>
    <div class="software-description">Analyzing Interval Data in Psychometrics</div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2025</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Author</span>
    </div>
    <a class="package-link" href="https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.intervalpsych">CRAN</a>
</div>

<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">PublicationBiasBenchmark</div>
    <div class="software-description">Benchmark for Publication Bias Correction Methods</div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2025</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Author</span>
    </div>
    <a class="package-link" href="https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.PublicationBiasBenchmark">CRAN</a>
    <a class="github-link" href="https://github.com/FBartos/PublicationBiasBenchmark">GitHub</a>
</div>

<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">gimme</div>
    <div class="software-description">Group Iterative Multiple Model Estimation</div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2025</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Contributor</span>
    </div>
    <a class="package-link" href="https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.gimme">CRAN</a>
</div>

<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">tsnet</div>
    <div class="software-description">Comparing and Visualizing Networks based on Time Series Data</div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2024</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Maintainer</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Author</span>
    </div>
    <a class="package-link" href="https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.tsnet">CRAN</a>
    <a class="github-link" href="https://github.com/bsiepe/tsnet">GitHub</a>
</div>

<div class="category-header">Python Packages</div>

<div class="software-item">
    <div class="software-name">openesm</div>
    <div class="software-description">Accessing the openESM Database</div>
    <div class="software-meta">
        <span class="year-label">2025</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Maintainer</span>
        <span class="role-badge">Author</span>
    </div>
    <a class="package-link" href="https://pypi.org/project/openesm/">PyPI</a>
    <a class="github-link" href="https://github.com/openesm-project/">GitHub</a>
</div>



</body>
```
